compiled_state.title: host session closes ticket with 'Escalated to user' without surfacing to user
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body: Bug details: A host session closes a bug ticket using --reason='Escalated to user: <summary>' without actually surfacing the ticket content or summary to the user in the interactive session. The user sees the ticket transition to closed with this reason, but the issue is never shown to them — effectively silently discarding the bug instead of escalating it. CLAUDE.md rule 18 prohibits using 'Escalated to user:' autonomously, but the underlying problem is that any close with this reason prefix does not trigger a visible escalation to the user. Expected: ticket stays open OR user sees the content before close. Actual: ticket is closed silently. Functions involved: ticket transition workflow in sprint/debug-everything orchestrators. Trigger: autonomous bug triage that determines no code fix is possible.
comments.author: Test
